_comment: Copy this file to config.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. For deployments (Railway, CI) supply the same JSON in the MBBB_CONFIG_JSON env var instead. Sync reads config.json first, then MBBB_CONFIG_JSON.
_comment_sources: Folders to scan, each recursively. Listing order is the attribution priority when the same file is reachable from several sources. Set "foldered": false on a source whose files are NOT organized into per-song subfolders — its files are grouped by the song embedded in each filename and merged into matching songs; unmatched files appear on the Extra Files tab. Omit it (default true) for sources laid out as <source>/<song>/<asset>. Set "generated": true on a source holding app-generated MuseScore output (one <Song>.parts folder per song, the build-scores result uploaded as-is): its scores MASK the manually-created score PDFs for the same song, while audio, notes, and the MuseScore master are kept.

google._comment: Drive SYNC credentials only — a Google service account (separate from website sign-in, which uses the `auth` block below). The source folders are public, so no folder sharing is needed; the service account just provides Drive API credentials for `npm run sync`. Paste the JSON key Google Cloud gives you here, inline.

_comment_auth: Web sign-in (Google OAuth 2.0). Create an OAuth *Web application* client in Google Cloud → Credentials and add the redirect URI <origin>/auth/callback for every origin you serve (e.g. http://localhost:5173/auth/callback for dev, https://your-host/auth/callback for prod). clientId/clientSecret come from that client. cookieSecret is any long random string used to sign the session cookie (e.g. `openssl rand -base64 48`). admins[] are bootstrap admin emails that always have the admin role (and can't be removed in the UI); everyone else is granted a role in data/users.json via the Users admin page. redirectUri is optional — set it only to override the auto-derived <origin>/auth/callback (e.g. behind a proxy). If this block is omitted, or clientId/clientSecret/cookieSecret are blank, the site runs OPEN with no sign-in required.
